creator: thomas@gibfest.dk
text:
I am unable to upgrade Postgresql server to the latest version in ports, as the client slave port databases/postgresql84-server cannot be installed. Ports tree is up to date.

Fix: 

Don't know. I emailed the maintainer a couple of days ago, and he said he would look into it, so this PR is just a reminder.
How-To-Repeat: portsnap fetch update
cd /usr/ports/databases/postgresql84-client
make install clean
